en: I'm saying, Carl, it's a bit dry in here.
ko: 내가 말하는 건, 칼, 여기 좀 건조해.

en: Um, uh, well, let me think.
Oh, dry as fucking dust. Come on! Roast me!
Give me a drubbing! Frank, start. Be funny.
It's not really my thing, Chief. Oh, you don't think I can take it?
No, it's just not my style. I mean, I can.
Uh, the thing about Logan Roy is...
Uh, the thing about Logan is... he's a tough old nut.
Oh, Christ. Sit fucking Caesar. Greggie?
You're mean. You're mean. You're a mean old man. You're a mean old bastard.
Uh, and you scare the life out of folks.
ko: 그리고 사람들을 무섭게 해. 그게 네 스타일이야?

en: That's your thing? You're scaring me right now, and that's why I don't even know what to do.
Who wants to smell Gregg's finger, eh?
